notes: This file is a sorry-free, axiom-clean foundation for Silverman III.8 divisor transport under translation. The dominant structure is a pipeline: placeTranslate (the bijection of projective places) → ordProj (unified order function) → ordProj_translate_infinity (the single residual for infinity-touching places, the longest proof at 77 lines relying on the upstream isTranslateOrdAtInftyCompatible_translateAlgEquivOfPoint) → ordProj_translate → projectiveDivisorOf_translate → fibre-invariance chain → capstone. Five public declarations are not referenced internally and serve as the exported API for downstream consumers (Constancy.lean, pairing_const_of_transport).
